steps.title: Identify the context for punctuation
steps.content: The phrase “find the answer” signals that a question was posed. The blank must contain a question.

steps.title: Apply question punctuation
steps.content: A question requires both inverted word order (verb before subject: “could these...”) and a question mark. Choice D uses both. The others fail: A and B use declarative order (“these penguins could”), while C uses interrogative order but closes with a period instead of a question mark. This matches choice D — D is correct.
